verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He was awake before the sun with his Bible opened up Seeking truth with every single page he turned Anyone could see Our pastor lived what He believed with the gentle heart and passion for Jesus earned. I know I had hard times I disobey But the longer we lived its clear to us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I wanna be that man Who loves the LORD with all his heart Just like the LORD commends who takes a stand and leads his CHURCH as he holds The FATHER's hand I wanna be that man

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Society would say There's a new ideal today "not what you give, its more about what you can get", But I wanna live a life? That's martyr by a sacrifice Just like the SAVIOUR who died To show us all the way So I'll take up my cross and trace HIS steps Surrending is how we serve HIM the best.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just like Peter, Paul, And all the saints of days gone by Let me show the kind of faith To those who come behind (come behind)
